tree.text: This is a story about a lion and a mouse.

children.text: Once upon a time, a big lion was sleeping peacefully.
Suddenly, a little mouse walked by and woke him up.
children.keywords: little mouse, walked by, woke him up
children.cn: 突然，一只小老鼠走过来把他吵醒了。
很久很久以前，一只大狮子正在安静地睡觉。

children.text: The lion caught the mouse, but the little mouse said, 'Please let me go.'
children.keywords: caught the mouse, said, let me go

children.text: 'I promise I can help you one day.'
The lion laughed at the idea, but let it go.
children.cn: 狮子嘲笑了这个主意，但还是算了。
“我保证有一天我可以帮助你。”
狮子抓住了老鼠，但是小老鼠说：'请放了我吧。'

children.text: Some days later, a hunter caught the lion in a large net.
Thankfully, the mouse saw this and came to help him.
children.keywords: mouse saw this, came to help

children.text: It bit through the net quickly, so the lion got out safely.
children.keywords: bit through quickly, got out safely
children.cn: 它很快咬断了网，所以狮子安全脱身了。
谢天谢地，老鼠看到了这一幕，过来帮助他。
几天后，一个猎人抓住了被困在巨网里的狮子。
